dialogue_island_3_intro: It seems that this place is connected to CpE, specifically about its courses.
dialogue_level_1_intro: It says here… piece to puzzle, complete to shine, connect them all, let skills align.
rules_level_1: Each piece represents a CpE course.
Complete all sets to finish the puzzle.

elements_level_1_round_1_first_year_fund.title: Computer Engineering Orientation
elements_level_1_round_1_first_year_fund.description: Introduces the CpE field, career paths, and core expectations. Helps you understand how hardware and software integrate in real systems.

elements_level_1_round_1_first_year_fund.title: Programming Logic And Design — Lab
elements_level_1_round_1_first_year_fund.description: Teaches step-by-step problem solving using algorithms and pseudocode. Builds your foundation for writing clear and correct programs.

elements_level_1_round_1_first_year_fund.title: Discrete Mathematics
elements_level_1_round_1_first_year_fund.description: Covers logic, sets, relations, functions, and counting methods. Forms your mathematical basis for algorithms and digital systems.

elements_level_1_round_1_first_year_fund.title: Engineering Physics
elements_level_1_round_1_first_year_fund.description: Applies calculus to motion, forces, energy, and electricity. Demonstrates physical principles through experiments.

elements_level_1_round_1_first_year_fund.title: Chemistry For Engineers — Lecture & Lab
elements_level_1_round_1_first_year_fund.description: Explains matter, materials, and chemical properties relevant to electronics. Includes lab work on reactions and measurements.

elements_level_1_round_1_first_year_fund.title: Calculus
elements_level_1_round_1_first_year_fund.description: Studies rates of change (derivatives) and volume of 3D objects. Helps model motion, signals, and system behavior.

elements_level_1_round_1_first_year_fund.title: Integral Calculus
elements_level_1_round_1_first_year_fund.description: Focuses on accumulation and integrals. Used for analyzing signal behavior and physical systems.

elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.title: Electrical Circuits For CpE — Lecture & Lab
elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.description: Teaches analysis of voltage, current, resistance, and power. Includes building and measuring real circuits.

elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.title: Electronic Circuits For CpE — Lecture & Lab
elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.description: Introduces diodes, transistors, and amplifiers. You design and test electronic components.

elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.title: Logic Circuits & Design — Lecture & Lab
elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.description: Covers Boolean algebra and digital logic gates. Focuses on designing combinational and sequential circuits.

elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.title: Differential Equations
elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.description: Teaches solving equations involving rates of change. Important for modeling dynamic systems.

elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.title: Object Oriented Programming — Lab
elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.description: Introduces classes, objects, and modular design. Helps build reusable and structured programs.

elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.title: Data Structures & Algorithm — Lab
elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.description: Teaches efficient data storage and processing. Improves problem solving and performance.

elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.title: Computer-Aided Drafting — Lab
elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.description: Trains you in technical drawing using software. Develops precision in visualization.

elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.title: Computer-Aided Drafting & Design — Lab
elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.description: Extends drafting into full design projects with engineering standards.

elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.title: Engineering Data Analysis — Lecture & Lab
elements_level_1_round_2_second_year_cir.description: Applies statistics to interpret engineering data and analyze results.

elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.title: Numerical Methods & Analysis — Lecture & Lab
elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.description: Teaches computational techniques for solving complex math problems using programming.

elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.title: Computer Architecture & Organization — Lecture & Lab
elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.description: Explains how CPUs, memory, and hardware components work together.

elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.title: Operating Systems
elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.description: Covers process management, memory, and file systems.

elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.title: Introduction To H.D.L. — Lab
elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.description: Teaches hardware description languages for circuit modeling.

elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.title: Microprocessor & Microcontroller Systems & Design — Lecture & Lab
elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.description: Focuses on programming and interfacing microcontrollers.

elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.title: Embedded Systems — Lecture & Lab
elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.description: Designs systems combining hardware and software using sensors.

elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.title: Fundamentals Of Mixed Signals & Sensors
elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.description: Explains interaction of analog and digital signals.

elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.title: Feedback & Control Systems
elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.description: Teaches system stability and automatic control.

elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.title: Data & Digital Communications
elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.description: Covers data transmission and networking basics.

elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.title: Data Signal Processing — Lecture & Lab
elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.description: Teaches signal analysis and filtering using algorithms.

elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.title: Engineering Management
elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.description: Focuses on project planning and team coordination.

elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.title: Engineering Economics
elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.description: Applies economic principles to engineering decisions.

elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.title: Technopreneurship
elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.description: Encourages innovation and tech-based business creation.

elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.title: Basic Occupational Safety & Health
elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.description: Promotes safety practices and hazard prevention.

elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.title: Methods Of Research (Capstone Design Project 1)
elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.description: Prepares research planning and proposal writing.

elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.title: CpE Elective 1
elements_level_1_round_3_third_year_syst.description: Allows specialization in a chosen CpE topic.

elements_level_1_round_4_fourth_year_int.title: Computer Networks & Security — Lecture & Lab
elements_level_1_round_4_fourth_year_int.description: Teaches networking and security systems configuration.

elements_level_1_round_4_fourth_year_int.title: Software Design — Lecture & Lab
elements_level_1_round_4_fourth_year_int.description: Focuses on software architecture and development.

elements_level_1_round_4_fourth_year_int.title: Capstone Design Project 2 — Drafting
elements_level_1_round_4_fourth_year_int.description: Continues development of your engineering project.

elements_level_1_round_4_fourth_year_int.title: Capstone Design Project 3 — Drafting
elements_level_1_round_4_fourth_year_int.description: Finalizes and presents your completed project.

elements_level_1_round_4_fourth_year_int.title: CpE Laws & Professional Practice
elements_level_1_round_4_fourth_year_int.description: Teaches ethics and responsibilities of engineers.

elements_level_1_round_4_fourth_year_int.title: Emerging Technologies In CpE
elements_level_1_round_4_fourth_year_int.description: Explores AI, IoT, and modern technologies.

elements_level_1_round_4_fourth_year_int.title: CpE Elective 2
elements_level_1_round_4_fourth_year_int.description: Expands knowledge in a specialized field.

feedback_level_1_after_game: The puzzle shows all subjects you will encounter in CpE.
dialogue_level_1_end_game: It seems that this place showed you all of the courses of CpE.
I wonder what the next island is going to be?
